explanation: Solar Panel, Wind Turbine, Hydroelectric Dam, and Geothermal Plant are all technologies that generate electricity from renewable resources. A Battery stores electricity but does not generate it.

Marie Curie, Albert Einstein, Nelson Mandela, and Martin Luther King Jr. are all recipients of the Nobel Prize. Leonardo da Vinci, a celebrated Renaissance polymath, lived centuries before the Nobel Prize was established.
Iron, Gold, Silver, and Platinum are all names of chemical elements found on the periodic table. Diamond, while a precious substance, is an allotrope of carbon, not an element name itself.
